title: Shutdown On Death
description: Shut your Computer Down on your Death
body:
# ShutDown on Death
A Mod that Simply **Shut your Computer Down** when you **Die**

![Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d5bea91aeb8c49837470e9a12c1245627bc9fa.png)

**🪟 Works on Windows. 🪟**

**🐧🍎 May not Work on certains Linux Distros and Mac OS. 🍎🐧**
